title: The Big Picture: Maximum uncertainty
summary:
Main
What could happen to Iran's exports? Trump said this week that he wants to make a deal with Iran rather than return to his policy of ‘maximum pressure'. Maximum pressure aims to restrict Iran's oil exports.
